title: SARS-CoV-2 RNA Extraction with Ceres Nanotrap and Zymo Environ Water
author: Amanda Windsor

steps.title: Shake wastewater bottle to mix then let sit 00:00:45
steps.instruction: Shake wastewater bottle to mix then let sit 00:00:45

steps.title: Using a 10mL serological pipette, carefully...
steps.instruction: Using a 10mL serological pipette, carefully pipette 10 mL of wastewater into a 15mL conical tube Input volumes of 20, 30, and 40mL have also been tested. See note in step 7 for volume of nanotrap particles to add based on starting volume

steps.title: Add 100 µL of Nanotrap® Enhancement...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of Nanotrap® Enhancement Reagent 2 (ER2) and invert 15mL tube 2-3 times to mix

steps.title: Re-suspend Nanotrap® particles by inverting the bottle 5 times
steps.instruction: Re-suspend Nanotrap® particles by inverting the bottle 5 times

steps.title: Place samples on magnetic rack to...
steps.instruction: Place samples on magnetic rack to separate Magnetic Nanotrap® particles from the sample - at least 00:02:00

steps.title: After beads have settled, use a...
steps.instruction: After beads have settled, use a 5mL serological pipette to remove all of the supernatant without disturbing the pelleted beads

steps.title: Add 1 mL of DNAse/RNAse Free water to the tube
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of DNAse/RNAse Free water to the tube

steps.title: Remove tube from magnet and re-suspend...
steps.instruction: Remove tube from magnet and re-suspend the pelleted beads using a 100-1000uL pipette

steps.title: Transfer suspended beads to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer suspended beads to a 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Place microcentrifuge tube on the 2mL tube-compatible magnetic rack
steps.instruction: Place microcentrifuge tube on the 2mL tube-compatible magnetic rack

steps.title: Incubate until the beads have settled - at least 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Incubate until the beads have settled - at least 00:02:00

steps.title: Remove supernatant with a 100-1000uL pipette without disturbing the pellet
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant with a 100-1000uL pipette without disturbing the pellet. Remove any small amount of remaining supernatant with a smaller pipette tip (e.g. 2-20uL pipette)

steps.title: Remove the tubes from the magnet...
steps.instruction: Remove the tubes from the magnet and re-suspend the pellet with 375 µL Zymo DNA/RNA Shield and 125 µL Zymo DNase/RNase-Free water from the Zymo Environ Water RNA Kit

steps.title: Incubate the samples at 95 °C for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the samples at 95 °C for 00:05:00

steps.title: While samples are incubating, add 400...
steps.instruction: While samples are incubating, add 400 µL Zymo RNA Binding Buffer from the Zymo Environ Water RNA Kit to new 1.5mL tubes (one per sample)

steps.title: Remove tubes from heat block and...
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from heat block and place on a magnetic rack and allow beads to settle until supernatant is clear - at least 00:02:00 Collect any liquid from caps by brief centrifugation prior to placing the tubes on the magnetic rack

steps.title: Transfer 400 µL of supernatant to...
steps.instruction: Transfer 400 µL of supernatant to the corresponding tube prepared in step 15.1 and mix by gentle pipetting sample tubes volume = 800µL

steps.title: Transfer entire sample to a Zymo-Spin™...
steps.instruction: Transfer entire sample to a Zymo-Spin™ IIICG Column in a clean collection tube and centrifuge 10000 x g, Room temperature, 30 seconds and keep the flow-through Label both the spin column and collection tube

steps.title: Add 800uL of ethanol (95-100%) to...
steps.instruction: Add 800uL of ethanol (95-100%) to the flow-through in the collection tube from step 18 and mix well by gentle pipetting sample volume = 1600µL

steps.title: Transfer 800 µL into a new...
steps.instruction: Transfer 800 µL into a new Zymo-Spin™ IIICG Column in a clean collection tube and centrifuge 10000 x g, Room temperature, 30 seconds and discard the flow through

steps.title: Repeat step 19 with the remaining...
steps.instruction: Repeat step 19 with the remaining 800 µL of sample using the same collection tube

steps.title: Add 100 µL Zymo DNase/RNase-Free water...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL Zymo DNase/RNase-Free water directly to the column matrix and centrifuge 10000 x g, Room temperature, 30 seconds and keep the flow-through for step 24

steps.title: Place a Zymo-Spin III-HRC Filter into...
steps.instruction: Place a Zymo-Spin III-HRC Filter into a new collection tube and add 600 µL Prep Solution Centrifuge 8000 x g, Room temperature, 3 minutes discard the flow-through

steps.title: transfer the column to an RNase-Free 1
steps.instruction: transfer the column to an RNase-Free 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Transfer the eluted RNA from step...
steps.instruction: Transfer the eluted RNA from step 22 into the Zymo-Spin III-HRC filter prepared in step 23 and 16000 x g, Room temperature, 3 minutes keep the flow-through

steps.title: Add 200 µL RNA Binding Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL RNA Binding Buffer to the filtrate and mix well by gently pipetting up and down.

steps.title: Transfer the mixture into a Zymo-Spin...
steps.instruction: Transfer the mixture into a Zymo-Spin IC column in a collection tube and 10000 x g, Room temperature, 30 seconds discard the flow-through

steps.title: Add 400 µL of RNA Prep...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL of RNA Prep Buffer to the column and 10000 x g, Room temperature, 30 seconds discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Add 700 µL of RNA Wash...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL of RNA Wash Buffer to the column and 10000 x g, Room temperature, 30 seconds discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Add 400 µL of RNA Wash...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL of RNA Wash Buffer to the column and 10000 x g, Room temperature, 2 minutes to ensure complete removal of the wash buffer. Transfer the column carefully into an RNase-free tube.

steps.title: Add 50 µL of DNase/RNase-Free Water...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL of DNase/RNase-Free Water directly to the column matrix and 10000 x g, Room temperature, 30 seconds The eluted RNA can be used immediately or stored at -70 °C .

steps.title: Add 400 µL RNA Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL RNA Wash Buffer to column and 10000 x g, Room temperature, 30 seconds Discard flow-through

steps.title: Add 5 µL DNase I and...
steps.instruction: Add 5 µL DNase I and 35 µL DNA Digestion Buffer to the column matrix

steps.title: Incubate 27 °C 00:20:00
steps.instruction: Incubate 27 °C 00:20:00

steps.title: Turn on heat block 95 °C
steps.instruction: Turn on heat block 95 °C

steps.title: Ensure appropriate volume of DNase I...
steps.instruction: Ensure appropriate volume of DNase I is available (5µL per sample), or make new aliquots

steps.title: Add 275 µL DNase/RNase-Free water to...
steps.instruction: Add 275 µL DNase/RNase-Free water to reconstitute lyophilized DNase I (1U/µL) Aliquot reconstituted DNase I in volumes appropriate for your lab's throughput (e.g., 15-20µL aliquots in 0.5mL microcentrifuge tubes) to avoid multiple freeze/thaw cycles

steps.title: Add 150 µL Nanotrap® particles to...
steps.instruction: Add 150 µL Nanotrap® particles to the sample the volume of nanoparticles for different starting volumes of wastewater are as follows: InputWastewater (mL) NanotrapParticles(µL) 1 20 300 2 30 450 3 40 600 volume of nanoparticles for different starting volumes of wastewater

steps.title: Incubate samples Room temperature 00:10:00 with constant rotation
steps.instruction: Incubate samples Room temperature 00:10:00 with constant rotation

steps.title: Add 400 µL of RNA Prep...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL of RNA Prep Buffer to the column and centrifuge 10000 x g, Room temperature, 30 seconds and discard the flow-through

steps.title: Transfer column to an RNase-Free 1
steps.instruction: Transfer column to an RNase-Free 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Add 300 µL of ethanol (95-100%)...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of ethanol (95-100%) to the filtrate + RNA Binding Buffer and mix well by gently pipetting up and down.
